@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
    def start_app():
        env = os.environ.copy()
        env["NOVU_SECRET_KEY"] = "test_secret_123"
    
        process = subprocess.Popen(
            ["npm", "start"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            env=env,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
            preexec_fn=os.setsid
        )

            os.killpg(os.getpgid(process.pid), signal.SIGTERM)
